expo.name: Pulse Nexus
expo.description: Pulse Nexus combines Apple Health, WHOOP, Fitbit, and Garmin into one plain-English view, with an optional Gemini-powered web Q&A tab.

infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Pulse Nexus reads your Apple Health data so it can summarize your activity, sleep, and recovery alongside WHOOP, Fitbit, and Garmin data.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Pulse Nexus does not write to Apple Health by default; this is reserved for future features.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Pulse Nexus reads your Apple Health data so it can summarize your activity, sleep, and recovery alongside WHOOP, Fitbit, and Garmin data.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Pulse Nexus does not write to Apple Health by default; this is reserved for future features.
